name: Oil India Limited
oneLine: Cleanest in portfolio: strict SPF -all, p=reject DMARC, strong CSP
findings: Strong CSP, all 6 hardening headers present (Permissions-Policy minimal)
Single subdomain (www only) — minimal CT footprint

fingerprints.stack: Drupal 9.x or 10.x + Citrix NetScaler gateway (X-Drupal-* + NetScaler integration markers)
versions: Drupal version not exposed; NetScaler version hidden
eolFlags: NetScaler version unknown; if vulnerable to CVE-2025-7775 / CVE-2025-5777, Tier 1 critical

attackPaths.name: Citrix NetScaler pre-auth RCE (CVE-2025-7775)
attackPaths.entry: If NetScaler externally accessible and unpatched (pre-14.1.47.48), memory corruption in packet processing yields unauthenticated RCE.
attackPaths.pivot: Compromise NetScaler appliance; bypass Drupal layer; direct internal-network access; VPN tunnel compromise; credential harvest.
attackPaths.objective: Lateral movement to Oil India backend; domain pivot.

attackPaths.name: Drupal object injection → RCE (CVE-2024-55637)
attackPaths.entry: Unsafe unserialize() in contrib module or custom code chains with core gadget sequence.
attackPaths.pivot: Inject serialised PHP object via POST/form; deserialisation triggers gadget chain.
attackPaths.objective: RCE as web-server user; DB access; lateral movement.

attackPaths.name: NTLM relay (CVE-2025-33073) if Windows AD backend
attackPaths.entry: Conditional on Windows AD + NTLM auth (typical PSU IT). Attacker on same network or via compromised app.
attackPaths.pivot: Trigger SMB client auth to attacker server; relay captured NTLM hash to internal service without SMB signing.
attackPaths.objective: Domain user privilege escalation; SAP / ERP access.

attackPaths.name: Ransomware via credential compromise
attackPaths.entry: Weak Drupal admin or credential reuse; password spray on SSH/RDP if exposed.
attackPaths.pivot: Reverse shell; ransomware deployment; encrypt NAS/backup.
attackPaths.objective: Production shutdown — 2022 Oil India incident demanded ₹57 crore.

paths.mythos: Network chokepoint compromise; perimeter eliminated; if VPN to remote drilling platforms, attacker pivots to OT control
paths.factor: ~8–15× (NetScaler is APT priority target; 2022 Oil India lateral movement was via VPN appliance)

paths.preAi: Drupal RCE → app-level execution → DB dump
paths.mythos: Web layer contained unless monolithic; intelligence leakage + supply-chain visibility

cisoPatchList.title: Citrix NetScaler ADC/Gateway upgrade to 14.1.47.48+
cisoPatchList.fix: NetScaler System → Diagnostics → System Information → NS Version. Upgrade to 14.1-47.48+ minimum. Backup config first. Post-upgrade test VPN clients.
cisoPatchList.validation: show ns version in NetScaler CLI returns ≥ 14.1-47.48

cisoPatchList.title: Drupal core upgrade for CVE-2024-55637
cisoPatchList.fix: drush status to identify version. Upgrade to 10.2.11+ / 10.3.9+ / 11.0.8+. composer require drupal/core:^10.2.11. drush cache:rebuild.
cisoPatchList.validation: drush eval 'echo Drupal::VERSION' confirms patched version

cisoPatchList.title: Enable SMB signing portfolio-wide (CVE-2025-33073 mitigation)
cisoPatchList.fix: Group Policy: 'Microsoft network client: Digitally sign communications (if server agrees)' → Required. gpupdate /force. Get-SmbClientConfiguration | Select RequireSecuritySignature.

cisoPatchList.title: Audit Drupal contrib modules for unserialize() usage
cisoPatchList.fix: drush pm:uninstall non-essential contrib modules. grep -r 'unserialize' modules/custom/ — refactor to JSON.
cisoPatchList.validation: grep returns 0; only trusted modules enabled

cisoPatchList.title: TLS renewal — GeoTrust G1 expires Nov 2026
cisoPatchList.fix: Schedule renewal 60 days before expiry (early September 2026). Procure DigiCert or equivalent.

phase2.headlineQuestion: Is the NetScaler appliance running a CVE-2025-7775-vulnerable version, and is it externally reachable? If yes, it bypasses Drupal entirely and is the highest-priority entry point for OIL.
phase2.coverageNotes: NetScaler version not externally exposed; inferred present via Drupal integration. Drupal version not visible; no admin-endpoint probing per carve-out. SMB signing internal-network-scope unverified.
